creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nindya Ayu Wulansari from comment #33)
You can't delete former comments.

From the log you posted in the latest comment, it does not look like a plugin error to me, but a trouble restarting it.  Depending on your configuration, OpenVPN may have dropped privileges, and can then no longer access /usr/local/lib/openvpn-auth-ldap.so or more likely /usr/local/etc/openvpn/ovpn-oldap.conf. Chances are that it is misreporting the error.

There are 44 minutes between these two log lines:

Sun Jan 18 16:17:27 2015 Initialization Sequence Completed

and

Sun Jan 18 17:01:00 2015 /sbin/route delete -net IP IP 255.255.255.0
delete net 167.205.29.0: gateway IP

So is it hitting some timeout?  LDAP timeout, or no client connecting, can you try to find that out?
